mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO backup_purchase_orders ( id, backup_id, original_id, user_id, order_no, supplier_id, order_date, expected_date, receive_date, status, total_amount, items, note, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.backupId}, #{item.originalId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.supplierId}, #{item.orderDate}, #{item.expectedDate}, #{item.receiveDate}, #{item.status}, #{item.totalAmount}, #{item.items, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{item.note}, #{item.createdAt} )
